create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the Filestore instance was created

effective_labels.description: Computed set of labels applied to the Filestore instance

effective_replication.description: Replication configuration currently in effect for the instance

etag.description: Checksum used to track changes to the instance's configuration

id.description: Unique identifier for the Filestore instance in the project

terraform_labels.description: Labels managed through Terraform for this Filestore instance
